# llms.txt

> Minimalist Portfolio — A professional, production-ready portfolio template built with Astro 6, Tailwind CSS, and Cloudflare Pages.

## What is this?

This is a high-performance portfolio template designed for developers and designers. It ships as a static site generator (SSG) with optional SSR capabilities via the Cloudflare adapter.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Astro 6.1+ (View Transitions, Islands Architecture, Content Layer API)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 3.x with adaptive HSL color tokens
- **Deployment**: Cloudflare Pages (via `@astrojs/cloudflare`)
- **Content**: MDX collections (projects, blog, services, testimonials, FAQ)
- **SEO**: JSON-LD structured data (FAQPage, Person, Article, Service, CreativeWork), Open Graph, Twitter Cards, Sitemap
- **PWA**: `@vite-pwa/astro` with auto-update service worker
- **Icons**: `astro-icon` with Phosphor Icons
- **Typography**: Inter + Roboto Mono (local-hosted via Fontsource)

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── components/
│   ├── sections/     # Page-level sections (Hero, FAQ, Testimonials...)
│   ├── cards/        # Data-driven cards (ProjectCard, PostCard...)
│   ├── navigation/   # Header, Footer, ThemePicker, Cursor...
│   └── ui/           # Reusable primitives (Button, Card, Input, SEO...)
├── content/          # MDX content collections
├── layouts/          # BaseLayout.astro (wraps all pages)
├── pages/            # File-based routing (index, blog, projects, services...)
├── styles/           # Global CSS variables and animations
├── utils/            # SEO schema generators, helpers
└── site-config.ts    # Single-file configuration
```

## Configuration

All customization lives in `src/site-config.ts`:
- Site metadata & SEO
- Profile info & social links
- Navigation structure
- Brand colors (light/dark adaptive)
- UI toggles (dark mode, custom cursor, view transitions)

## Content Collections

| Collection | Path | Schema |
|---|---|---|
| Projects | `src/content/projects/*.mdx` | title, description, technologies, image, date, repo, live |
| Blog | `src/content/blog/*.mdx` | title, date, summary, draft |
| Services | `src/content/services/*.mdx` | title, summary, description, icon, order |
| Testimonials | `src/content/testimonials/*.md` | author, role, content, avatar, company |
| FAQ | `src/content/faq/*.md` | question, answer, order |
| Changelog | `src/content/changelog/history.md` | title (optional), markdown body |

## Key Features

- **Zero JS by default**: Astro strips all JavaScript unless explicitly opted in via `client:*` directives
- **Adaptive Color System**: Separate HSL tokens for light and dark modes, configurable in one place
- **Reveal Animations**: Intersection Observer-based scroll animations (`.reveal` class)
- **ThemePicker Pro**: Real-time color customization with 12+ palettes (dev mode only)
- **PWA Ready**: Manifest, service worker, offline support
- **WCAG AA**: ARIA labels, focus management, semantic HTML
- **Cloudflare Hardened**: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy via `_headers`

## Quick Start

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev          # Start dev server at localhost:4321
pnpm build        # Production build
pnpm preview      # Preview production build
```

## Links

- **Live Demo**: https://buyportfolio.zutra.agency
- **Documentation**: `/_docs/index.html` (open in browser after install)
- **Changelog**: `/changelog` on deployed site or `CHANGELOG.md` in repo
- **Source**: https://zutra.agency
